creator: jbeich@FreeBSD.org
text:
Comment on attachment 176364
sayaka-3.2.2.diff

>+OPTIONS_DEFINE=	COLORMAP
>+OPTIONS_DEFAULT=

I've assumed typo here in favor of making the binary package more useful i.e., COLORMAP is enabled by default. If you think otherwise file a new bug, blocking this one (so I'm notified).

>-	${INSTALL_SCRIPT} ${WRKSRC}/sayaka.sh ${STAGEDIR}${PREFIX}/bin/sayaka
>+	${INSTALL_PROGRAM} ${WRKSRC}/sayaka ${STAGEDIR}${PREFIX}/bin/sayaka

I've omitted path tail on the right side as the file is no longer renamed.
